title: Avoid calling Spring proxy methods via 'this'
description: Spring proxying mechanisms can break when methods are called via 'this' within the same class. This bypasses proxy logic, leading to missing cross-cutting concerns like transactions or security. Always call proxied methods from outside the class or inject the proxy itself.
recommendation: Do not call methods with Spring proxying annotations (e.g., @Transactional, @Async) via 'this'. Use dependency injection to access the proxy if needed.

checks.message: Avoid using @Transactional annotation. Do not call methods with Spring proxying annotations (e.g., @Transactional, @Async) via 'this'. Use dependency injection to access the proxy if needed.
